name: DeepSeek-V3
description: DeepSeek-V3: A 671B MoE model rivaling GPT-4 on benchmarks. Open-weight with inference code, training pipeline, and FP8 support. The model that shook the AI industry in 2025.

name: DeepSeek-R1
description: DeepSeek-R1: An open-source reasoning model matching OpenAI o1 across math, code, and logic. Pioneered open reasoning with reinforcement learning — no supervised fine-tuning needed.

name: ollama
description: Get up and running with large language models locally. Supports Llama 4, DeepSeek, Gemma 3, Qwen 3, Mistral and dozens more. The backbone of the local AI revolution.

name: open-webui
description: User-friendly web interface for AI. Works with Ollama, OpenAI, and custom backends. Rich plugin ecosystem with RAG, web search, and function calling support.

name: Dify
description: The all-in-one LLMOps platform for agentic workflows. Visual workflow builder, RAG pipeline, multi-model support, and API-first design. Surpassed 100K GitHub stars in mid-2025.

name: n8n
description: Open-source workflow automation with native AI. 400+ integrations, LangChain support, and visual no-code builder. Surpassed 150K stars — the fastest-growing automation tool ever.

name: langchain
description: Build context-aware reasoning applications. Composable primitives for RAG, agents, chains, and memory. The most adopted LLM framework in production worldwide.

name: langgraph
description: Build resilient language agents as graphs. Stateful multi-actor orchestration with built-in persistence, streaming, and human-in-the-loop support. Part of the LangChain ecosystem.

name: llama.cpp
description: LLM inference in C/C++. Quantized models for CPU inference with GGUF format. The backbone of most local AI tooling — runs models on laptops, phones, and Raspberry Pi.

name: vllm
description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs. PagedAttention, continuous batching, and tensor parallelism for production-scale deployment.

name: ComfyUI
description: The most powerful modular diffusion model GUI and backend. Graph/nodes interface for Stable Diffusion, Flux, and more. Top 100 most-starred GitHub repo of all time.

name: stable-diffusion-webui
description: Stable Diffusion web UI with a full-featured browser interface. ControlNet, inpainting, img2img, upscaling, and extension ecosystem. The original image gen powerhouse.

name: browser-use
description: Make AI agents interact with real websites. Autonomous browser automation for AI — click, type, navigate, and extract data from any webpage. 80K+ stars in record time.

name: CrewAI
description: Framework for orchestrating role-playing AI agents. Create collaborative crews that work together on complex tasks. 45K+ stars and the go-to multi-agent framework.

name: autogen
description: A framework for building multi-agent conversational AI. Enable complex orchestration patterns between agents with code generation, execution, and iterative debugging.

name: transformers
description: State-of-the-art ML for PyTorch, TensorFlow, and JAX. 200K+ pre-trained models for NLP, vision, audio, and multimodal tasks. The central hub of modern AI development.

name: Qwen3
description: Qwen3: Alibaba's latest open-source LLM family. Dense and MoE models from 0.6B to 235B. Supports 100+ languages with state-of-the-art reasoning and coding capabilities.

name: gemma
description: Google DeepMind's open-weight LLM family. Lightweight, multimodal, multilingual models that run on CPU/GPU/TPU. Gemma 3 adds vision and 140+ language support.

name: llama-models
description: Meta's Llama model family — from Llama 3 to Llama 4. Open-weight foundation models up to 405B parameters. The most downloaded open-source LLM series in history.

name: ai
description: The AI SDK by Vercel. Build AI-powered streaming text and chat UIs in React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, and Node. Multi-provider support with structured outputs.

name: OpenClaw
description: The breakout AI star of 2026. A personal AI assistant that runs locally, connecting models to 50+ integrations — WhatsApp, Slack, Discord, smart home, and more.

name: langflow
description: Low-code platform for designing and deploying AI agents and RAG workflows. Drag-and-drop visual builder with LangChain integration and multi-agent conversation support.

name: RAGFlow
description: Open-source RAG engine for deep document understanding. End-to-end pipeline from ingestion to retrieval-augmented generation. One of GitHub Octoverse 2025's fastest-growing.

name: llamaindex
description: The data framework for LLM applications. Connect, index, and query your data with any LLM. Essential for building production RAG, agents, and knowledge retrieval systems.

name: unsloth
description: Fine-tune LLMs 2-5x faster with 70% less memory. Supports Llama, Gemma, DeepSeek, Qwen, Mistral and more. The go-to tool for efficient model customization.

name: LocalAI
description: Free, open-source OpenAI alternative. Self-hosted, community-driven, local-first AI inference. Runs on consumer GPUs and CPUs with ggml, transformers, and diffusion backends.

name: whisper
description: Robust speech recognition via large-scale weak supervision. OpenAI's general-purpose speech recognition model — transcribe and translate audio in 100+ languages.

name: ChatGPT-Next-Web
description: A cross-platform ChatGPT/Gemini/Claude UI. One-click deploy your own AI chat app with GPT, Gemini, Claude, DeepSeek and more. Self-hosted with beautiful UI.

name: gpt-researcher
description: An autonomous agent for comprehensive online research. Plans workflows, scrapes information from 20+ sources, and generates cited research reports with one click.

name: openai-agents-python
description: OpenAI's official Agents SDK for Python. Lightweight, production-ready framework for multi-agent workflows with handoffs, guardrails, and tool use. Released March 2025.

name: mastra
description: TypeScript framework for building intelligent applications and AI agents. Multi-step workflows, context management, memory, and tool orchestration for production apps.

name: google-adk-python
description: Google Agent Development Kit (ADK). Build, deploy, and orchestrate multi-agent systems with Gemini and Vertex AI integration. Hierarchical agent compositions.

name: Qwen-Agent
description: Agent framework built on Qwen models. Function calling, MCP server support, Code Interpreter, RAG, and browser automation. Supports QwQ-32B tool calls.

name: gemini-cli
description: Google Gemini CLI — interact with Gemini from the terminal. Run prompts, process files, and integrate into scripts. 80K+ stars in months — one of the fastest-growing repos ever.

name: claude-code
description: Anthropic's AI coding assistant for local development. Refactoring, code generation, test writing, and codebase understanding. Integrated into terminal workflows.

name: gpt-oss
description: OpenAI's first open-source LLMs since GPT-2. gpt-oss-120B and gpt-oss-20B — open-weight models designed for agentic tasks. A watershed moment for open AI.

name: pytorch
description: Tensors and dynamic neural networks in Python with strong GPU acceleration. PyTorch 2.6 ships with 3x faster torch.compile cold-start. The researcher's framework of choice.

name: anything-llm
description: The all-in-one desktop & Docker AI app. Multi-user, multi-model workspace with RAG, agents, and custom plugins. Turn any document into an AI-powered knowledge base.

name: copilotkit
description: Open-source framework for integrating AI copilots into applications. React UI components, headless architecture, and in-app AI assistance. Build copilot experiences in minutes.

name: marimo
description: A next-gen Python notebook for reproducible, maintainable AI/ML development. Reactive execution, Git-friendly, and production-ready. The Jupyter killer for 2025.

name: giskard
description: Open-source testing framework for LLMs and ML models. Detect bias, hallucinations, and vulnerabilities before deployment. Automated evaluation for responsible AI.

name: lobe-chat
description: Open-source, extensible AI chat framework. Supports multi-model providers, function calling, plugin system, vision, TTS, and knowledge base. Beautiful UI out of the box.

name: haystack
description: End-to-end NLP framework for building LLM applications, RAG pipelines, and search systems. Modular, production-ready, with enterprise support from deepset.

name: mlx
description: Apple's array framework for machine learning on Apple Silicon. Lazy evaluation, unified memory, and composable transforms. Run ML locally on M1/M2/M3/M4 MacBooks.

name: opencode
description: Open-source AI coding assistant for the terminal. Multi-provider support, multi-session parallel agents, and VS Code integration. Built with TypeScript.

name: docsgpt
description: AI-powered documentation assistant. Upload docs, code, or knowledge bases and get instant, accurate answers with citations. Open-source alternative to Glean.

name: whisper.cpp
description: High-performance inference of OpenAI's Whisper in C/C++. Runs speech recognition on CPU, mobile, and edge devices. Same author as llama.cpp.

name: openhands
description: An autonomous AI software engineer. Give it a task and it writes code, runs tests, debugs, and iterates. Previously known as OpenDevin — the open-source Devin alternative.

name: kotaemon
description: Open-source, clean RAG-based tool for chatting with documents. Beautiful UI, local model support, multi-user, and citation tracking. Production-ready document Q&A.

name: TEN-Agent
description: The world's first real-time multimodal AI agent framework. Voice, vision, and tool use in real-time conversations. Build next-gen voice AI assistants.
